---
title: "Architecture"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Architecture}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

The release centers on a small set of contracts:

- deterministic analytical services produce evidence;
- artifacts preserve provenance and quality metadata;
- ReportContracts translate analytical meaning into semantic report structure;
- the Build Week runtime records inquiry state, belief revision, recommendation evolution, claim verification, and integrity review;
- the package launch path runs from installed resources, not developer source files.

The public demo is deliberately bounded. It is not an unconstrained autonomous analytics agent.
